title: Smoky Noodle Stir Fry
description: Quick and easy stir fry recipe made with smoky noodles, light vegetables, and a hint of smoky flavor.
instructions: Cook the smoky noodles according to package directions.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the light vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fry rice vinegar, soy sauce, and smoked sesame oil.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions and peanuts if desired.
